title: blepharis macra
intro: Blepharis macra, also known as the Desert Tear or Blepharis, is a perennial herb native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Africa and Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Blepharis macra include treating wounds, reducing fever, and relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Blepharis macra are often dried and used in teas, infusions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
